arts.sum: Fiorentina have officially announced the acquisition of Nicolò Zaniolo from Galatasaray on a temporary basis with an option to make the transfer permanent. This move marks a return to familiar territory for Zaniolo, who began his youth career in Fiorentina's academy. The post OFFICIAL: Nicolo Zaniolo Joins Fiorentina appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Roma Secure Nelsson from Galatasaray, Eyes Salah-Eddine as Transfer Window Closes
arts.sum: Roma have made significant strides in bolstering their defence as the winter transfer window draws to a close. The Giallorossi have reached an agreement with Galatasaray for Danish centre-back Victor Nelsson, with the deal expected to be finalized in the early hours of the morning. The post Roma Secure Nelsson from Galatasaray, Eyes Salah-Eddine as Transfer Window Closes appeared first on FootItalia.com.
